data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. PANTHER'S WAY turned in a solid run fresh when finishing in the placings at this track in a Grade 5 H (16.99). Solid record at the distance winning two races. The form out of the last run is proven to be strong. Winning claims. 3. EXAGGERATOR missed the frame latest (16.79) when seventh over 300m at this track in a Free For All. Has already won out of this draw. Can feature in the finish. 2. TRUTH TELLER finished in the minors last start over the 300m at this track but ran a quick 16.75 last start. Smart time latest and looks a key chance on that form. 5. FLAT OUT FREDDY looks a top-three hope after a break.","runners":[6,3,2,5],"exclusive":false}
